Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed compose-external-wave-5 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/gemini-api.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run external-skill-auditor before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

Use when the user asks about using Gemini in an enterprise environment or explicitly mentions Vertex AI, Google Cloud, or Agent Platform. Guides the usage of the Gemini API on Agent Platform with the Google Gen AI SDK.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add google/skills --skill gemini-api -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained via authoring + research for compose-external-wave-5; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add google/skills --skill gemini-api -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode` status=inspect-then-install; selector=named
